display_text: Bounty Hunter Aghanim's Scepter: Shuriken Toss gains increased cast range and applies Jinada on hit. This upgrade enhances Bounty Hunter's burst damage and catch potential, making it a strong counter to mobile heroes by ensuring guaranteed Jinada procs on distant targets.
search_text: Bounty Hunter Aghanim Scepter Shuriken Toss Jinada burst damage catch potential anti-mobility

display_text: Bounty Hunter Aghanim's Shard: Friendly Shadow applies Shadow Walk to an ally, including its bonuses, with a reduced fade time. This upgrade transforms Bounty Hunter into a support enabler, countering enemy vision and detection by providing allies with temporary invisibility and movement speed.
search_text: Bounty Hunter Aghanim Shard Friendly Shadow Shadow Walk ally invisibility anti-vision support enabler
